creator: tatsuki_makino@hotmail.com
text:
I suspect it has regressed? maybe.

I think this is the commit that changes whether or not the build is possible.
https: //cgit.freebsd.org /ports/commit/devel/py-pyproject_hooks?id=281005ac6d0d21a003e5a975aa94dc0c527cb855

In addition, it seems that there are packages that need to be forcibly rebuilt before and after the commit.
devel/py-wheel@py39 seems to be one of them, but I haven't looked into how the content has changed.
